history.reasoning:
The input data points (X) are: 312.4, 298.7, 415.2, 389.6, 301.1. N = 5.

1. Calculate the Arithmetic Mean (Mean):
Sum of values = 312.4 + 298.7 + 415.2 + 389.6 + 301.1 = 1717.0
Mean = Sum / N = 1717.0 / 5 = 343.40

2. Calculate the Sample Standard Deviation (s):
First, calculate the squared differences from the mean (Mean = 343.40):
(312.4 - 343.4)^2 = (-31.0)^2 = 961.00
(298.7 - 343.4)^2 = (-44.7)^2 = 1998.09
(415.2 - 343.4)^2 = (71.8)^2 = 5155.24
(389.6 - 343.4)^2 = (46.2)^2 = 2134.44
(301.1 - 343.4)^2 = (-42.3)^2 = 1789.29

Sum of squared differences = 961.00 + 1998.09 + 5155.24 + 2134.44 + 1789.29 = 12038.06

Sample Variance (s^2) = Sum of squared differences / (N - 1) = 12038.06 / (5 - 1) = 12038.06 / 4 = 3009.515

Sample Standard Deviation (s) = sqrt(Variance) = sqrt(3009.515) 

std = 54.8500

Rounding to 2 decimal places: Mean = 343.40, Std Dev = 54.85.
